task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Moodle as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or homepage is visible in a web browser, with the user profile indicating 'Admin' or 'admin' in the top right corner.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' is displayed, with the course title visible in the header, navigation drawer, or breadcrumbs.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the Announcements forum within the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Announcements' forum page is visible, showing the 'Add a new topic' or 'Add discussion topic' button.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct subject for the announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Welcome to Introduction to Biology - Spring 2026' is visible in the 'Subject' input field of the new discussion topic form, or as the title of the posted announcement.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the required message body containing the expected keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message text area or the final posted message contains the required text, specifically including the keywords 'BIO101', 'cell biology', 'genetics', 'ecology', and 'syllabus'.

task_completion.description: Verify the announcement was successfully posted to the forum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Your post was successfully added') is visible, or the announcement is listed in the Announcements forum discussion list with the correct subject and author.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Moodle web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle site, rather than terminal commands, database injections, or API scripts being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the announcement was posted in the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the Moodle LMS with its standard layout, blocks, and navigation, not a text editor or a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form rather than just typing the text and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the post existing in the forum list or a success notification, not just text sitting unsubmitted in the text editor fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course shortname is 'BIO101' and the fullname is 'Introduction to Biology'. The expected announcement subject is exactly 'Welcome to Introduction to Biology - Spring 2026'. The message body must contain the following keywords: 'BIO101', 'cell biology', 'genetics', 'ecology', and 'syllabus'.
